title: Enhanced Password Security Policy
goal: To significantly strengthen the protection of user accounts and personal data by adopting modern industry standards for authentication. This update aims to mitigate the risk of unauthorized access via brute-force or credential-stuffing attacks, ensuring a more resilient digital ecosystem for My Autogrill members.
description: We are transitioning from a legacy 6-character minimum requirement to a robust password policy. Starting in March, all new registrations and password resets will require a minimum of 8 characters, including at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one numeric digit, and one special character. This multi-layered complexity ensures that user credentials meet the highest security benchmarks.
